summary: Systems review accepts implementation commit 6b793907fc27308a96b7e2d5fd23da8134b6927c and writer handoff commit 70207269817859dfd48c147a7a92afbe95f2b7fb for M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001. The decision focus is a UI-only derived projection in packages/ui over existing ClientReadModelSnapshot slices, selected entity intent, active task drawer, map mode, and existing command status strings. It does not introduce authoritative client WorldState, new protocol/save/content schema, new command surface, implicit RPC, object graph serialization, or a second writer for simulation state. Task rail, map surface, route queue, district list rows, and right inspector share active-object/current-action presentation metadata through React props and DOM attributes only; command submission still uses existing client-core command DTO builders and onM3/onM4 submit callbacks. Default overlay de-noising is phase/action relevant, with player-language legend labels for focus, supply path, obligation pressure, risk area, blocked/strained path, and settlement; debug/read-model wording remains behind explicit debug mode or covered legacy accessibility labels, not the player legend. The writer implementation commit touches only allowed UI/Web/test paths and no forbidden sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, content-source, Electron, desktop, tools, docs/ADR, CI, dependency, telemetry, server, manual battle, or final-art paths. Cumulative branch diff includes a lead process PROJECT_STATUS.md start note outside the task allowed_paths list, but it is not part of the writer implementation commit and has no product-code or forbidden-package impact.

decisions.decision: Accept ClientDecisionSurfaceFocus as a UI-local read-model projection. It is constructed inside packages/ui from ClientReadModelSnapshot, selected entity intent, active task drawer, map mode, and existing command status strings, and is not serialized across protocol/save/content boundaries.

Accept data-decision-action, data-decision-object, data-current-action, data-active-object, and data-visible-overlays as presentation/test metadata only. They synchronize task rail, map surface, route queue, district list, and inspector without making React/Pixi authoritative state.

Player actions still route through existing client-core command DTO builders and submit callbacks. The new focus helpers do not apply commands, mutate WorldState, call simulation services, or bypass preview/confirm/read-model boundaries.

Accept selectVisibleMapLegendTones as player-facing de-noising. Default obligation focus shows selected/route/obligation/settlement, campaign/notifications opt into risk, route mode or blocked/capacity state opts into blocked-path legend, and post-action results remove route/obligation clutter.

No ADR is required because there is no architecture, package-dependency, protocol, save, content schema, Electron security, deterministic simulation, technology stack, or frozen product decision change.

risks.summary: The cumulative branch diff includes PROJECT_STATUS.md from the lead start process commit even though the task allowed_paths list does not include it.
risks.mitigation: This was not part of the writer implementation commit, changes only the process start snapshot, and has no product-code or forbidden-package impact. Lead/QA may decide whether future task JSON should explicitly allow status checkpoint edits.

risks.summary: Reviewer-side validation confirms DOM/read-model synchronization and legend text/overlay state, but not pixel-level visual composition.
risks.mitigation: Route to qa_reviewer for independent UX/smoke acceptance; no systems blocker found.

requested_action: qa_reviewer should perform independent acceptance for M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001, including player-facing UX smoke for map/task/inspector synchronization and overlay de-noising. Do not mark formal M7 content lock accepted; this task only advances the systemic interaction recovery chain.
